title: Peacekeepers
summary: A friendly Lower Manhattan survivor group formed by civilians and former Joint Task Force members.

claims.text: The Peacekeepers are civilians and JTF veterans who banded together.
By Warlords of New York, the group has survived for more than eight months and developed better training.

paragraphs.text: The Peacekeepers represent organized civilian survival reinforced by former JTF experience, making them a friendly counterpart to Lower Manhattan's hostile factions.

verification.notes: Named members and settlement-level details await direct game evidence.
